utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Step 1: Count how many items are present in the final property solution. All six appear. Step 2: Check if each is fully specified with all required details. 'property' includes only criteria and a pending status, not an actual selected property with details and price, so it is not fully specified. 'financing' includes all terms (institution, amount, rate, amortization, term, down payment, expiry) – fully specified. 'legal_services' includes detailed costs and total closing costs – fully specified. 'moving_services' includes cost ranges and totals – fully specified. 'setup_services' lists utilities with cost ranges – fully specified. 'total_budget' includes a full breakdown – fully specified. Therefore, 5 of 6 items are fully specified.

The property itself is not yet finalized ('pending listings'), so no direct property from the list can be mapped.
